'''shadhungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderene|leaderene]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderene|leaderene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shadhungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædhingith|shædhingith]] || [[word:shædhingij|shædhingij]] || [[word:shædhingish|shædhingish]] || [[word:shædhingi|shædhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhudhunguth|shadhudhunguth]] || [[word:shadhudhunguj|shadhudhunguj]] || [[word:shadhudhungush|shadhudhungush]] || [[word:shadhudhungu|shadhudhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhunguth|shadhunguth]] || [[word:shadhunguj|shadhunguj]] || [[word:shadhungush|shadhungush]] || [[word:shadhungu|shadhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhufnguth|shadhufnguth]] || [[word:shadhufnguj|shadhufnguj]] || [[word:shadhufngush|shadhufngush]] || [[word:shadhufnguf|shadhufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadhunguthu|shadhunguthu]] || [[word:shadhunguju|shadhunguju]] || [[word:shadhungushu|shadhungushu]] || [[word:shadhunguku|shadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadhunguth|shadhunguth]] || [[word:shadhunguj|shadhunguj]] || [[word:shadhungush|shadhungush]] || [[word:shadhungu|shadhungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadhunguthul|shadhunguthul]] || [[word:shadhungujul|shadhungujul]] || [[word:shadhungushul|shadhungushul]] || [[word:shadhungukul|shadhungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadhunguthuthu|shadhunguthuthu]] || [[word:shadhungujuju|shadhungujuju]] || [[word:shadhungushushu|shadhungushushu]] || [[word:shadhunguku|shadhunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadhunguthun|shadhunguthun]] || [[word:shadhungujun|shadhungujun]] || [[word:shadhungushun|shadhungushun]] || [[word:shadhungukun|shadhungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadhunguthuoro|shadhunguthuoro]] || [[word:shadhungujuoro|shadhungujuoro]] || [[word:shadhungushuoro|shadhungushuoro]] || [[word:shadhungukuoro|shadhungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
